description: Unit tests for the Config class, testing its default configuration, merging logic, and type checking mechanisms within the project.

classes.name: DummyConfigClass
classes.description: A subclass of Config used in tests to verify configuration handling.

methods.name: DefaultType
methods.description: Static getter returning the expected types for configuration options.

methods.name: _mergeConfigObj
methods.description: Merges data attributes from DOM elements with default configuration, handling data attribute overrides and JSON parsing.

methods.name: _typeCheckConfig
methods.description: Checks if a configuration object matches expected types, throws TypeError on mismatch.
